products.title: FRIGIDAIRE 26 lb. Portable Countertop Ice Maker in Stainless Steel
products.description: This ice maker produces up to 26 lbs. of bullet ice per day, with 2 ice size settings.

products.title: NewAir 50 lb. Portable Ice Maker with Self-Cleaning Function
products.description: 50 lb daily capacity, self-cleaning, transparent lid to monitor ice production.

products.title: GE Profile Opal Nugget Ice Maker - Connects to WiFi
products.description: Makes soft, chewable nugget ice like your favorite restaurant. WiFi enabled via SmartHQ app.

products.title: Igloo Automatic Portable Ice Maker, 26 lbs per Day, Black
products.description: Compact portable ice maker in black finish. 9 ice cubes per cycle.

products.title: Whynter IMC-490SS Stainless Steel 49 lb Ice Maker with Drain Pump
products.description: Freestanding stainless steel ice maker with built-in drain pump. 49 lb daily production.
